content:
💡 vt-cli | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: Interacting with the VirusTotal API and its threat intelligence data via a command-line interface.
✨ Key Features: • Retrieve information about files, URLs, domains, IP addresses • Search for files and URLs using VirusTotal Intelligence query syntax • Download files • Manage LiveHunt YARA rules • Launch and manage Retrohunt jobs
📖 Summary: The VirusTotal CLI is a command-line interface tool that allows users to interact with the VirusTotal API. It enables users to retrieve information about files, URLs, domains, and IP addresses, search for threats, download files, and manage YARA rules and Retrohunt jobs directly from their terminal.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
